title: Artifact Renderer Pipeline Catalog
description: Deterministic artifact rendering pipeline: Detail DNA -> Instruction Set -> DXF/SVG/PDF. All outputs carry SHA-256 lineage hashes.

modules.purpose: Rendering contract definitions: manifest, output, result, capability
Canonical geometry primitive types: LINE, ARC, POLYLINE, RECTANGLE, TEXT, HATCH, DIMENSION, CALLOUT
Translates Detail DNA into typed instruction sets of geometry primitives
modules.output: Instruction set with primitives, layers, metadata

modules.purpose: Orchestrates deterministic rendering: manifest -> instructions -> renderers -> artifacts
Central catalog of registered renderers with capability declarations
DXF renderer: primitives -> AutoCAD R2000 DXF (inches, INSUNITS=1)
SVG renderer: primitives -> SVG markup with layer groups
PDF renderer: primitives -> SVG -> PDF content stream
SHA-256 lineage tracking: content hashes, lineage records, bundle verification
Classified error taxonomy for all rendering failures. Fail-closed.

pipeline.flow: Detail DNA -> Instruction Set -> Renderers -> DXF/SVG/PDF
pipeline.determinism: All renderers produce identical output for identical input
pipeline.lineage: Every artifact carries SHA-256 content hash and source lineage

governance_rules: Kernel is never mutated by renderers
Renderers consume primitives only — no classification or resolution logic
All rendering failures are classified errors
